Real DNS, Fetch, streams, fast-xml-parser, Express, PostgreSQL, processes, signals, handle and load claims, containers, accessibility review, backups, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Schedule per-origin work without monopolization while respecting per-publisher cadence and useful global throughput.

For Feed aggregation and TypeScript Defend the Feed Ts Origin Fairness model · Theory Feed Ts Origin Fa…, challenge the documented misconception with runtime, failure, race, or toolchain evidence: A FIFO array automatically treats publishers fairly.
